Params: {1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory187.png'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryTongxunHalfNew.prefab', 2: '2', 3: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Camu', 3: 'Alright, pick a path you like.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Camu', 3: '...What is it? I\'ll find my own way to the surface.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'You hear the rumbling of mechanical movement coming from all over the theme park.'}
{3: 'The pressed buttons and pulled levers must have activated something in the park.'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryTongxunHalfNew.prefab', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lee', 3: 'I\'m still a little worried, but there\'s no getting off this ride now.', 4: '2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory188.png'}
{3: 'The old valves and rotating mechanisms hum as you head deeper into the theme park. It seems like a number of doorways and barricades have now been opened.'}
{3: 'Finally awakened from their age-long slumber, the ancient mechanisms cough up dust in sheets and clouds.'}
{3: 'Fortunately, Liv clamps a gas mask over your face in time, though it did hurt the bridge of your nose a little.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lee', 3: 'Now scanning... Air composition test complete. Liv, you can take the mask off of Commandant.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Lee', 3: 'Unlike the underground, the viral density here is still in the safe range.', 4: '2'}
{2: '...this place is really big.', 3: '32'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory196.png'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Liv', 3: 'No matter what I had imagined before, this has certainly exceeded my expectations...', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Indeed, I\'ve never seen anything like this.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lee', 3: 'But Babylonia isn\'t completely devoid of these entertainment facilities though, yeah?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Sophia', 3: 'The scale of this is on another level.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'You\'re not surprised, Sophia?', 3: '45'}
{2: 'Sophia', 3: 'I read the brochure Jamilah found on the ride here. I have all the maps and structures memorized.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Sophia', 3: 'Did you not read it, Commandant?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Liv', 3: 'You must have, right, Commandant?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lee', 3: 'Well, Babylonia was made to recreate life on Earth for people away from it...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Lee', 3: '...But it was not possible to accommodate a "theme park"" of this size. There is just no space to waste on a large-scale facility just for ""entertainment."', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Sophia', 3: 'So that was why everyone was surprised.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Liv', 3: 'Scanning complete. The traces in the area are... quite complicated.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Liv', 3: 'Including Roland\'s, there are at least six traces with different traits here.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Let\'s decide on search areas then.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Sophia', 3: 'I will visit the indoors amusement area once more with Ayla. It felt a bit off when we passed by earlier.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Chrome', 3: 'Then Strike Hawk and Karenina will head toward the Ferris wheel.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Chrome', 3: 'Our weapons work best in more spacious areas.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Then Gray Raven will scout the aquariums.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'We shall converge later to share our findings.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Then, let\'s move out!', 4: '1'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory189.png'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Camu', 3: 'Well, looks like my work here is done.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Camu', 3: 'All right then...', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Just as Camu turns to leave, he feels a chill run down his spine. Immediately, he unsheathes his Greatsword to block his back.'}
{3: 'A rain of bullets bounce off his sword, creating a symphony of clangs. The bullets ricochet off the sword and hit nearby terminals, causing sparks to fly.'}
{2: '???', 3: 'Hehe... Hehehe... I didn\'t think you would be able to block my Hetero-shots. You\'ve got some fast reflexes.'}
{2: 'Camu', 3: '...Tch, that gloomy fish lady back in Kowloong?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lamia', 3: 'What\'s-sa-matter? Not our first meeting, right...?', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Lamia', 3: 'But then again, even your speech pattern is different... Looks like there was some truth in what Roland said after all.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Camu', 3: '...What did that prick say?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Lamia', 3: 'Why do you care what he said?', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Lamia', 3: 'You should be caring about what I\'m saying.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Camu', 3: 'Hah, whatever. I don\'t care about either of you.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Lamia', 3: 'Even when it\'s about Kamui?', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Lamia', 3: 'Ever wondered why "Kamui" got sealed away all of a sudden?', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Lamia', 3: 'That\'s not something "we"" did. We only gave you your ""ticket" to connect to Ascnet.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Lamia', 3: 'And... even if you try to separate Kamui now to buy some time for him...', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Lamia', 3: 'Your "main personality" Kamui is going to be gone in 140 hours anyway.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Lamia', 3: 'I can smell it... Your frame is unstable. If we put some pressure on it, it\'ll...', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Lamia', 3: '—Hey! Stop that!', 4: '2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryHitNew.prefab', 2: '2'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Camu is already swinging his Greatsword at Lamia before she could finish her sentence.'}
{3: 'But it is blocked by a wall formed by Heteromers.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Camu', 3: 'It\'s true that this frame is unstable and I do need a new frame.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Camu', 3: 'I guess yours will do since we\'re both Ascendants.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Lamia', 3: '...In case you haven\'t noticed, mine is a female frame, you sure you\'re okay with that...?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Camu', 3: 'If it can make you shut up, then I\'ll take it.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lamia', 3: '...Hehe, just as Miss Luna said, you really are an interesting fellow...', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Lamia', 3: '...What do you say, would you like to join us? If you do, we\'ll provide you with a new frame immediately, one that\'s absolutely stable, of course.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Lamia', 3: '—Not that I think you have any other choice on that matter.', 4: '2'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Camu', 3: 'Ha, in your dreams.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Camu', 3: 'It\'s not like all Ascendants are your mates, like that "Qu" girl who runs Kowloong.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Camu', 3: 'I\'d rather be in control of my own life.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Lamia', 3: 'Hehe... Interesting, but naive. Oh, so naive.', 4: '2'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryHitNew.prefab', 2: '2'}
{3: 'Camu lifts his Greatsword and deals a heavy blow to crack the Heteromer wall.'}
{3: 'To maintain the offensive flow, Camu immediately throws his left fist and legs at Lamia to keep up the pressure.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Camu', 3: 'To let someone else dictate how my life goes? Not in a million years!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'After flipping through the air, Camu raises his sword once again to swing at Lamia.'}
{3: '—But the blade only hits air.'}
{2: 'Lamia', 3: '...A pity. I was starting to find you interesting, but turns out you\'re just as boring as the others.'}
{2: 'Lamia', 3: 'Good bye. See you—never, maybe.'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Texture/Image/BgStory/Bgstory196.png'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Sophia', 3: 'Sophia and Ayla reporting back. We\'ve found someone.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Nanami', 3: 'That\'s right! It\'s me! Na-na-mi!', 4: '2'}
{2: 'What are you doing here?', 3: '166'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'That\'s what I want to ask you! What are you guys doing here at Nanami\'s secret base?!', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'This was my secret base and no one else\'s... And now, boom! It\'s filled with people!', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'That\'s why Nanami ran off to hide! JUST WHEN I finally broke the game and got to farming infinite lives too!', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Did you see someone weird?'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'Let Nanami think... Well, I didn\'t see any people, but...', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Sophia', 3: 'I suggest that you speak. Now.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'Ah! So cold! It tickles, hahaha! Sophia, stop shoving a gun to my waist!', 4: '2'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Ayla', 3: 'Tell us what you know and we\'ll get Sophia to stop.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Nanami', 3: 'Ahaha! Achoo! All right! I\'ll talk! I\'ll talk!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'When Nanami was farming points in "Iron Formation BX Invincible Remastered Annual α++++ Feat. DK-Hyper", there was this rumbling going grrrr from under the floor...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'But I was almost at 9999990 points! So I didn\'t really pay attention to... Hey! Stop it!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Ayla', 3: 'How did you even remember such a long and tasteless game title...', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Nanami', 3: 'Oh! But after that, some weird noises shot over from the roller-coaster platform... but Nanami ain\'t no roaster-coaster-obsessor, so I ignored it.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Not a roaster-coaster-obsessor, huh…', 3: '193', 4: 'Around when did that happen?', 5: '196'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'Hmph! So what if Nanami don\'t find no rollers cooler, but squeals for Ferris wheels?! Nothing wrong with that!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'If the Ferris wheel wasn\'t broken I would\'ve been on it!', 4: '1'}

{2: 'Nanami', 3: 'What are you looking at me like that for?! "Iron Formation BX" on MAX heat takes about 12-something seconds to fill the combo gauge. That\'s how Nanami calculated the time!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Ayla', 3: 'And when is that?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Nanami', 3: 'Sigh! Who has time to keep the time?! If we really need to be specific, then it\'s from 9993366 points to 9997428 points, which is... 5 minutes 14 seconds?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Ayla & Sophia', 3: '...And you said you didn\'t remember.', 4: '1', 5: '2'}

{1: '1', 2: 'Nanami', 3: 'What are you looking at me like that for?! "Iron Formation BX" on MAX heat takes about 12-something seconds to fill the combo gauge. That\'s how Nanami calculated the time!', 4: '1'}
{2: 'I don\'t even know what to say to that...', 3: '208', 4: 'You\'re really serious about this game...', 5: '208'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lucia', 3: '...Hm? Is it just me or did the number of people here increase?', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lucia', 3: 'We encountered another Task Force at the aquarium.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'It was Vera and her team.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'I didn\'t expect them to be here.', 3: '221'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'Me neither, we still don\'t know what their objective is...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'I\'ll ask around.', 3: '223', 4: 'Maybe they\'re here on vacation too?', 5: '231'}
{1: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryTongxunHalfNew.prefab', 2: '2'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Hassen', 3: 'Cerberus? Hm, I\'m not sure as well. I\'ll go see if Nikola knows something.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Hassen', 3: 'I understand your situation. For now, pursue "Shome". It is highly likely that he knows what we want to know.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Hassen', 3: 'But we didn\'t have time to prepare for this mission, so you\'ll have to make do with the resources you have on hand.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'As per usual, I see.', 3: '229'}
{2: 'Hassen', 3: 'Haha, anyway, just do what you can before reinforcements arrive.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Hassen', 3: 'Since we can confirm that there are several Ascendants in the area, it may be more dangerous than you think. Be careful.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Assets/Product/Effect/Prefab/FxUi/FxUiStoryNew/FxUiStoryTongxunHalfNew.prefab'}
{2: 'Lee', 3: 'Impossible.', 4: '3'}
{2: 'Liv', 3: 'I don\'t think vacationing is their thing...?', 4: '2'}
{2: 'Lucia', 3: 'I also find it hard to believe.', 4: '1'}
{3: 'Let me summarize. Gray Raven encountered Cerberus in the water cloister area; while Sophia and Ayla "picked up" Nanami in the indoors amusement area...'}
{3: 'After sorting out the current situation, everyone realizes that what they\'ve done has successfully... made the situation even more complicated.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lee', 3: '...If Cerberus is here, then that means Commander Nikola is plotting something here.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Liv', 3: 'But the data shows that this area has always been a safe zone...', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Ayla', 3: 'Better not to trust the public data.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Ayla', 3: 'Public data may have been edited in order to protect top-secret data of the Task Force.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Ayla', 3: 'That doesn\'t only apply to locational data, but also Construct data. They are sometimes edited to prevent tracking.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Lee', 3: 'No matter what\'s hidden here, we can\'t deny the fact that Cerberus is here.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Lee', 3: 'Also, multiple unknown traces point toward the indoors amusement area.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Liv', 3: 'The traces seem to lead to another exit underground, but the area beneath the ground is a Dead Zone...', 4: '1'}
{2: 'I guess we\'ll have to call Camu...', 3: '256'}
{3: 'The team tries to contact Camu again, but to no avail.'}
{2: 'Liv', 3: 'His GPS signal is gone as well... It is possible he has entered an unknown blind zone.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Camu will find us.', 3: '261'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Liv', 3: 'Understood. I\'ll keep trying to establish a connection with him in the mean time.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Liv', 3: 'It\'s coming from where Cerberus was headed... No, there were explosions at six different spots underground at the same time!', 4: '1'}
